texto: I do everything in my power to promote positivity however and whenever I can; and, constructively and softly, try to encourage tweens and teens that if they want to be part of a dialogue on my social platforms, there is an expectation that they do so with poise and respect.
explicacao: Citação de Ryan McCartan sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I do everything in my power to promote positivity however and whenever I can; and, constructively…” articula coragem, power, want em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como want e try.

frase_original: I do everything in my power to promote positivity however and whenever I can; and, constructively and softly, try to encourage tweens and teens that if they want to be part of a dialogue on my social platforms, there is an expectation that they do so with poise and respect.
